TEXT.BibTeX_citation: @misc{Wiki_tay_Pa’anifong, title = Pa’anifong, year = 2025, month = May, day = 5, note = {In Wikipedia [Atayal]}, url = {https://tay.wikipedia.org/wiki/Pa’anifong} }

S.FORM: alang Pa'anifong ga niya mki sku Tayto Keng atu Hikasiki go, kwara sali buwan nya ga 511 buwan, 1,057 hi ku kwara s'uli tayan. s'uli tayan pinspngan Gyencumin ga 42% kyan ku 446 hi, binah ga, 'yat kahun sku pinspngan Gyencumin ga 58% kyan ku 611 hi nya. pinspung na linhuyan Gyencumin ga, Amis 40%, Bunun 1%, binah lihuyan s'uli 1%. rhzyal kki'an tay mkraya' na Pa'anifong hya' ga Kalifangar. tay mkyahu' na Pa'anifong hya' ga 'Etolan. rekisi kayal kyokay maki 1 kyokay. ssquliq pinlpgan ppqbaqan pqwasan biru 'laqi' cikuy maki 1 pqwasan biru 'laqi' cikuy. tuqi 'san basu kisya' glgan spyangan na pinbahu Ubuy qqmayh

alang Pa'anifong ga niya mki sku Tayto Keng atu Hikasiki go, kwara sali buwan nya ga 511 buwan, 1,057 hi ku kwara s'uli tayan. s'uli tayan pinspngan Gyencumin ga 42% kyan ku 446 hi, binah ga, 'yat kahun sku pinspngan Gyencumin ga 58% kyan ku 611 hi nya. pinspung na linhuyan Gyencumin ga, Amis 40%, Bunun 1%, binah lihuyan s'uli 1%. rhzyal kki'an tay mkraya' na Pa'anifong hya' ga Kalifangar. tay mkyahu' na Pa'anifong hya' ga 'Etolan. rekisi kayal kyokay maki 1 kyokay. ssquliq pinlpgan ppqbaqan pqwasan biru 'laqi' cikuy maki 1 pqwasan biru 'laqi' cikuy. tuqi 'san basu kisya' glgan spyangan na pinbahu Ubuy qqmayh
S.PHON: alaŋ paʔani*oŋ ɣa nija mki s~ɕku tajto keŋ atu ħikas~ɕiki ɣo, kwara s~ɕali βuwan nja ɣa *** βuwan, *,*** ħi ku kwara s~ɕʔuli tajan. s~ɕʔuli tajan pins~ɕpŋan ɣjenʦ~ʨumin ɣa **% kjan ku *** ħi, βinaħ ɣa, ʔjat kaħun s~ɕku pins~ɕpŋan ɣjenʦ~ʨumin ɣa **% kjan ku *** ħi nja. pins~ɕpuŋ na linħujan ɣjenʦ~ʨumin ɣa, amis~ɕ **%, βunun *%, βinaħ liħujan s~ɕʔuli *%. rħzjal kkiʔan taj mkrajaʔ na paʔani*oŋ ħjaʔ ɣa kali*aŋar. taj mkjaħuʔ na paʔani*oŋ ħjaʔ ɣa ʔetolan. rekis~ɕi kajal kjokaj maki * kjokaj. s~ɕs~ɕquliq pinlpɣan ppqβaqan pqwas~ɕan βiru ʔlaqiʔ ʦ~ʨikuj maki * pqwas~ɕan βiru ʔlaqiʔ ʦ~ʨikuj. tuqi ʔs~ɕan βas~ɕu kis~ɕjaʔ ɣlɣan s~ɕpjaŋan na pinβaħu uβuj qqmajħ
